steps.title: Find the key mechanism
steps.content: The claim argues hip-hop pedagogy encourages student success by raising students' interest and engagement. To support this, we need evidence that students are actually more interested and engaged in hip-hop courses.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the mechanism
steps.content:
High enrollment and attendance rates directly show that students are more interested and engaged in these courses.

The other three either discuss irrelevant comparisons, contradict the claim, or focus on teacher rather than student perspective.

That matches Choice D — Courses that incorporate hip-hop and rap music are among the courses with the highest enrollment and attendance rates..
